title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details
scenario: Find My Device geo icon does not display last known location details (address, device status, date, battery) for disconnected/out-of-range headset
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is paired but currently disconnected (out of range or powered off).
4. Tap the App Menu (hamburger icon or menu icon).
5. Tap 'Find My Device' from the menu. (If prompted, grant GPS location access.)
6. Locate the gray geo icon on the Find My Device screen.
expected: A new window is displayed showing: address of the last known location (street & city), device name & status, date of last connection, and last known battery percentage.
